nodes.label: AI as emotional buffer for professional communication
nodes.label_negative: Raw emotional response in professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: responding to emails in a professional way when I am feeling a bit too emotionally charged

nodes.label: AI as time-saving personal assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as inefficient or requiring oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I use it like a personal assistant, basically

nodes.label: AI reliability in long-context tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI hallucination and forgetting in long context
nodes.grounding_span: it started to hallucinate or forget things that I had told it

nodes.label: AI adherence to business-specific values
nodes.label_negative: AI deviation from company morals and values
nodes.grounding_span: it started suggesting products that were not eco-friendly

nodes.label: AI as idea generator and collaborator
nodes.label_negative: AI as mere executor without creativity
nodes.grounding_span: It often has ideas that I might not have considered

nodes.label: AI integration with existing tools
nodes.label_negative: AI as separate tab requiring context switching
nodes.grounding_span: instead of having to use a separate tab for an AI in my browser

nodes.label: Professional composure and empathy
nodes.grounding_span: speak to the client with understanding and empathy

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it tends to save me a lot of time and money

nodes.label: Business integrity and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: practices that are against our company's morals or values

nodes.label: Seamless workflow and reduced friction
nodes.grounding_span: just have a button or extension in the browser to ask it directly

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for communication drafting
nodes.grounding_span: One time I was satisfied with AI was when it helped me draft a communications document

nodes.label: Frustration with AI in bookkeeping due to lack of visibility
nodes.grounding_span: Situations where AI at work tends to make me particularly frustrated is when I'm doing bookkeeping

nodes.label: Cautious reliance on AI for speed, not full delegation
nodes.grounding_span: I have always made sure that I only rely on them in ways that just help speed up my work

nodes.label: Hopeful expectation for future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I am hoping that maybe as the technology evolves, it becomes integrated

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — uses AI draft then personalizes
nodes.grounding_span: I will often explain the situation to an AI that will help reassure me

nodes.label: Domain-specific verification — double-checks AI outputs against business rules
nodes.grounding_span: I also find it helpful for tasks like bookkeeping, but only when I am overseeing it directly
